mapper.sql: s.id, s.session_id, s.sequence_no, s.title, s.objective, s.status, s.task_id, s.assignee_id, s.started_at, s.completed_at, s.failure_reason
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM project_orchestration_steps s INNER JOIN project_orchestration_sessions sess ON sess.id = s.session_id WHERE sess.project_id = #{project_id} AND s.session_id = #{session_id} AND s.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY s.sequence_no ASC, s.id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_orchestration_steps( session_id, sequence_no, title, objective, status, task_id, assignee_id, started_at, completed_at, failure_reason ) SELECT #{session_id}, #{sequence_no}, #{description.title}, #{description.objective}, #{description.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description.task, typeHandler=reengineering.ddd.mybatis.support.RefIntegerTypeHandler}, #{description.assignee, typeHandler=reengineering.ddd.mybatis.support.RefIntegerTypeHandler}, #{description.startedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{description.completedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{description.failureReason} FROM project_orchestration_sessions sess WHERE sess.id = #{session_id} AND sess.project_id = #{project_id}
